retrieved_result: Helping you thrive at ASU Helping you thrive at ASUAs the #1 public university chosen by international students, we serve international students across ASU’s five campuses and location in Lake Havasu City, Arizona. We work to facilitate the success of our more than 10,000 international students and scholars during their time
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about ASU international students and university support, not about database query optimization.
